Rules for Odin Inspector attributes (grouping, validation, conditional visibility) and Odin Validator (ISelfValidator, SceneValidator, RootObjectValidator, WithFix)

Rules for RNGNeeds plugin — ProbabilityList<T>, weighted random selection, pick methods, item management, influence providers, seeding
UniTask async/await rules — CancellationToken, exception handling, timeouts, UniTaskVoid, API conventions
